note: Component wraps Button without adding state, derivation, or behavior. Deletion test: removing collapses to <Button> at call sites with no logic loss.
Hook wraps a single useState. Deletion test: callers use useState directly without coordination loss.
AppLogger forwards to tracing::event! macros 1:1. Deletion test: callers invoke tracing macros directly without losing any abstraction.

OrderContainer aggregates 2 hooks, derives view-model, owns confirm/cancel lifecycle, encodes a business rule (shipped orders cannot cancel). Deletion test: removing forces every caller to duplicate fetch+state+handlers+rule.
Redactor compiles patterns once, validates uniqueness, owns Cow-based replacement, and provides reverse lookup. Deletion test: removing forces callers to re-implement compile+validate+apply.

Borderline. useToggle returns named tuple (value, toggle, set) with stable callbacks. Deletion test: removing pushes useState+useCallback+functional-update pattern to every caller. The naming and stable identity earn the wrapper.
